name: Airport Park
description: Airport Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Matamoras, PA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Palmyra Township Municipal
description: Come play pickleball at Palmyra Township Municipal in Paupack, PA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
